name: Raymarch Infinite Tunnel
description: A GLSL TOP raymarches the inside of an endless twisting tunnel — the camera flies down a wobbling cylindrical SDF whose cross-section warps along its length. Mirrors the tunnel style of create_raymarch_scene. Animation/quality knobs are GLSL uniforms (uTime, uCameraZ, uSteps, uIntensity) plus two depth-gradient colors; after import bind uTime's value to absTime.seconds * <speed> for forward flight (manual-wire — RecipeSchema parameters take constants only). Complements the feedback-based feedback_tunnel by being a true 3D raymarched tunnel. Fills the SDF/raymarch gap. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; UNVERIFIED pending live cook-check.

nodes.name: tunnel
nodes.comment: Raymarches the inside of a twisting cylinder SDF; uniforms via Vectors/Colors sequences.

glsl_uniforms.name: uTime
glsl_uniforms.label: Time
glsl_uniforms.description: Forward-flight phase. After import set to absTime.seconds * <speed> (manual-wire — RecipeSchema parameters take constants only).

preview_description: A first-person flight down an endless cylindrical tunnel that twists and wobbles as it recedes, walls shading from warm near the camera to cool in the distance.
